# Canonical DiSCO API Field Reference

**Source of truth:** `disco_live_world_client_ui/javascript-client/src/model/` (auto-generated from DiSCO OpenAPI spec)

This document lists the **exact canonical field names** for each DiSCO API model. Any field not listed here is NOT part of the canonical API and must only be used in prototype endpoints.

---

## Entity Report (EntityResponse.js)

Server-assigned primary key: `entity_msg_uuid`

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `entity_msg_uuid` | String | Yes | Server-assigned message UUID |
| `source_entity_uuid` | String | Yes | Endpoint's entity tracking ID |
| `source_payload_uuid` | String | Yes | Endpoint identity |
| `latest_timestamp` | Number | Yes | Measurement time (UTC ms) |
| `write_timestamp` | Number | Yes | Server write time (UTC ms) |
| `pulsedata_uuid` | String | Yes | Reference to pulse data |
| `elnot` | String | Yes | ELNOT identifier |
| `emitter_key` | String | Yes | Emitter key |
| `emitter_name` | String | Yes | Emitter name |
| `emitter_type` | EmitterType | No | RADAR, COMMUNICATIONS, etc. |
| `emitter_type_description` | String | No | Human-readable emitter type |
| `modulation_type` | ModulationType | No | PULSED, CW, FHSS, etc. |
| `modulation_type_description` | String | No | Human-readable modulation type |
| `signal_bandwidth` | SignalBandwidth | No | Signal bandwidth object |
| `frequency_range` | FrequencyRange | Yes | {frequency_min, frequency_max, frequency_avg} |
| `amplitude_avg` | Number | Yes | Average signal amplitude |
| `pulsewidth_range` | PwRange | Yes | {pulsewidth_min, pulsewidth_max, pulsewidth_avg} |
| `pri_range` | PriRange | Yes | {pri_min, pri_max, pri_avg} |
| `position` | Position | Yes | {latitude, longitude, altitude} |
| `ellipse` | Ellipse | Yes | {orientation, semi_major_axis_length, semi_minor_axis_length} |
| `position_position_covariance` | Object | Yes | Covariance matrix |
| `fingerprint_center` | FingerprintCenters | No | |
| `fingerprint_dev` | FingerprintDevs | No | |
| `data` | String | Yes | Opaque data field |

**Note:** Our surrogate implements a subset of these fields. Missing fields (pulsedata_uuid, emitter_key, emitter_name, signal_bandwidth, position_position_covariance, fingerprint_*, data) are not generated by the emulator. This is fine for a surrogate — the key requirement is that field NAMES match exactly.

---

## Position Report (PositionReportMsg.js)

Server-assigned primary key: `position_report_msg_uuid` (NOT `position_report_uuid`)

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `position_report_msg_uuid` | String | Yes | Server-assigned message UUID |
| `source_position_report_uuid` | String | Yes | Endpoint's report ID |
| `source_payload_uuid` | String | Yes | Endpoint identity |
| `write_timestamp` | Number | Yes | Server write time (UTC ms) |
| `latest_timestamp` | Number | Yes | Measurement time (UTC ms) |
| `magnetic_heading` | Number | Yes | |
| `altitude_reference` | String | Yes | |
| `position` | Position | Yes | {latitude, longitude, altitude} |
| `dof` | DOF | Yes | {pitch, roll, yaw} |

---

## Live World Model (LiveWorldModelResponse.js)

Server-assigned primary key: `liveworldmodel_uuid`

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `liveworldmodel_uuid` | String | Yes | Server-assigned UUID |
| `origin_uuid` | String | Yes | |
| `entity_msg_uuid` | String | Yes | |
| `frequency_range` | FrequencyRange | Yes | |
| `position` | Position | Yes | |
| `write_timestamp` | Number | Yes | |
| `latest_timestamp` | Number | No | |
| `initial_timestamp` | Number | No | |
| `entity_name` | String | No | |
| `entity_type` | EntityType | No | |
| `emitter_type` | EmitterType | No | |
| `emitter_name` | String | No | |
| `modulation_type` | ModulationType | No | |
| `elnot` | String | No | |
| `heading` | Number | No | |
| `speed` | Number | No | |
| `domain` | String | No | |
| `platform_type` | String | No | |
| `mil_view` | MilView | No | {disposition, nationality} |
| `ellipse` | Ellipse | No | |
| `detection_range` | DetectionRange | No | |
| `group_num` | Number | No | |
| `group_uuid` | String | No | |
| `summary` | String | No | |
| `origin` | String | No | |
| `primary_designator` | String | No | |
| `secondary_designator` | String | No | |
| `amplitude_avg` | Number | No | |
| `pri_range` | PriRange | No | |
| `pulsewidth_range` | PwRange | No | |

---

## Shared Sub-Types

| Type | Fields |
|------|--------|
| Position | `latitude`, `longitude`, `altitude` |
| DOF | `pitch`, `roll`, `yaw` |
| Ellipse | `orientation`, `semi_major_axis_length`, `semi_minor_axis_length` |
| FrequencyRange | `frequency_min`, `frequency_max`, `frequency_avg` |
| PriRange | `pri_min`, `pri_max`, `pri_avg` |
| PwRange (PulsewidthRange) | `pulsewidth_min`, `pulsewidth_max`, `pulsewidth_avg` |
| MilView | `disposition`, `nationality` |
| DetectionRange | `detection_max_radius`, `detection_min_radius` |

---

## Response Wrappers

| Wrapper | Field | Type |
|---------|-------|------|
| EntityResults | `tasks` | EntityResponse[] |
| PositionReportsResults | `tasks` | PositionReportMsg[] |
| LiveWorldModelResults | `tasks` | LiveWorldModelResponse[] |
| All Results | `nextPageToken` | String (optional) |

---

## Prototype-Only Fields (NEVER in canonical responses)

These fields exist only on prototype endpoints and must never appear in canonical API responses.

| Field | Model | Prototype Capability | Prototype Endpoint |
|-------|-------|---------------------|--------------------|
| `observation_distance_km` | Entity Report (extended) | `entity_report_lob` | `/api/v1/prototype/entityReportLob/getLatest` |
| `observation_bearing_deg` | Entity Report (extended) | `entity_report_lob` | `/api/v1/prototype/entityReportLob/getLatest` |
| `sensor_latitude` | Entity Report (extended) | `entity_report_lob` | `/api/v1/prototype/entityReportLob/getLatest` |
| `sensor_longitude` | Entity Report (extended) | `entity_report_lob` | `/api/v1/prototype/entityReportLob/getLatest` |
| `sensor_altitude_m` | Entity Report (extended) | `entity_report_lob` | `/api/v1/prototype/entityReportLob/getLatest` |

---

## Known Past Deviations (Fixed)

| Wrong Name | Correct Name | What Happened | Fixed |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|-------|
| `position_report_uuid` | `position_report_msg_uuid` | Initial implementation used wrong field name | Feb 2026 |
| `observation_bearing_deg` in canonical response | Prototype-only | Non-canonical field leaked into `rowToEntity()` | Feb 2026 |
| `observation_distance_km` in canonical response | Prototype-only | Non-canonical field leaked into `rowToEntity()` | Feb 2026 |
| `modulation` | `modulation_type` | Shortened field name used instead of canonical | Earlier |
| `created_timestamp` | `write_timestamp` | Wrong timestamp field name | Earlier |
